content: im sorry are you better now? is everything alright?
Yeah, I'm good. Just a bit of a delay getting everything sorted. Thanks for checking in. I was actually trying to join the server to see how it’s running. Everything should be fine now. 😊
Thats good, im still trying to test some functionality so these errors will likely arise again, but i am working really hard to fix them so you run seemlessly!
Got it. I’m here to help if you need any support. Let me know if you need me to test anything or if you want to go over any specific issues. 😊
